case_title: ANTHONY'S SHOE SERVICE INC.-GINO GENTILE VS PLUMMER,MARDI J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $111.60 FILED BY ANTHONY'S SHOE SERVICE INC.-GINO GENTILE AS TO DEFENDANT PLUMMER,MARDI J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
CORRESP. FROM MARDI PLUMMER RECEIVED REQUESTING A CONTINUANCE, PUT IN FILE AND SENT TO COURT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANTHONY'S SHOE SERVICE INC.-GINO GENTILE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PLUMMER,MARDI J. $60.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $96.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PLUMMER,MARDI J.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PLUMMER,MARDI J.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-20-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-10-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $124.15 AS TO DEFENDANT PLUMMER,MARDI J.
